page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.10xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz. This instance features 40 dedicated physical cores with 40 vCPUs, utilizing a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. It is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 4.8 GB of RAM per core. The processor includes 35 MB of L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and AVX512_VNNI. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this server in the average tier across multiple workloads. In stress-ng testing, it achieves a single-core score of 1438.99 and a multi-core score of 38378.07. Memory bandwidth tests show 108.89 GB/sec for large-block read-only operations and 48.09 GB/sec for large-block write operations. For database workloads, the instance handles 34.78 million Redis SET operations per second and scores 14249.04 in Passmark database operations. In language model processing, it achieves 1841.39 tokens per second for prompt processing on a small 135M model and 56.94 tokens per second on a medium 7B model.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high clock speed provide reliable compute density without the performance variability associated with shared-core or hyperthreaded environments. The absence of bundled local storage and GPU hardware means users only pay for compute and memory resources, though external storage costs must be factored in. This resource profile is suitable for high-frequency general-purpose workloads, multi-threaded decompression tasks, database operations, and web serving applications that require consistent CPU performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.10xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server featuring 40 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 3.1 GHz. It is configured with 192.0 GB of RAM, translating to 4.8 GB of memory per core, and lacks local storage or GPU accelerators. The instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. Benchmark results indicate stable mid-range performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 38378.07 and a Passmark CPU score of 34691.95. It handles database operations efficiently, achieving 34.78 million Redis SET operations per second. Lacking hyperthreading, the dedicated core model ensures predictable execution. This server is suited for CPU-heavy general-purpose applications, database hosting, multi-threaded data decompression, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.10xlarge is a general-purpose server featuring 40 dedicated Intel Xeon cores at 3.1 GHz, 192 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for databases and web serving.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.10xlarge is a 40-core Intel Xeon server with 192 GB RAM, offering dedicated compute power and 12 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated 40-core processor platform with balanced memory configuration, designed for predictable database performance and multi-threaded enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 40 dedicated physical Intel Xeon cores running at 3.1 GHz
192.0 GB of system memory providing 4.8 GB per core
12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
No bundled local storage or GPU hardware included
Suited for database operations, web serving, and multi-threaded decompression
